name: Artha
description: AI Financial Intelligence. Sanskrit for wealth and purpose — one of the four aims of human life. Company analysis, SEC filings, financial metrics, and economic indicators.

skills.name: Company Analysis
skills.description: Comprehensive company analysis using fundamental data, SEC filings, and financial statements.
examples: Give me a fundamental analysis of NVIDIA's last 4 quarters
Compare Apple and Microsoft's capital allocation strategies

skills.name: SEC Filing Search
skills.description: Search and analyze SEC EDGAR filings — 10-Ks, 10-Qs, 8-Ks, proxy statements — with XBRL data extraction.
examples: Find Tesla's latest 10-K risk factors section
What did Alphabet disclose in their most recent 8-K?
Extract revenue segments from Amazon's latest 10-Q

skills.name: Financial Metrics
skills.description: Calculate and compare financial ratios, valuation multiples, and performance metrics across companies and sectors.
examples: Calculate EV/EBITDA for the top 5 semiconductor companies
What is the Altman Z-score for Boeing?

skills.name: Market Research
skills.description: Sector analysis, economic indicator tracking, and macro trend identification using financial data.
examples: How has the AI infrastructure sector performed relative to S&P 500 YTD?
What do current treasury yield curves suggest about recession risk?
